top_signals.title: Speech by Commissioner Kos on the 20th anniversary of Montenegro's independence
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Speech Podgorica, 21 May 2026 Dear citizens of Montenegro,
Dear President Milatović,
Dear Speaker of Parliament Mandić,
Dear Prime Minister Spajić,
Twenty years ago, Montenegrins voted to re...
